Bash(python3 -c "

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
with open\('/home/brian/code/dotfiles/.config/omp.toml', 'r'\) as f:
    lines = f.readlines\(\)

# The original icon was a nerd font SSH icon, restore + add hostname
# Line 21 \(index 20\) needs to be fixed
for i, line in enumerate\(lines\):
    if 'SSHSession' in line:
        # Replace the broken \\1 back to the original SSH icon \(nf-md-ssh\)
        lines[i] = "    template = '{{if .SSHSession}} \\uf817  {{.HostName}} {{end}}'\\n"
        print\(f"Fixed line {i+1}: {repr\(lines[i]\)}"\)

with open\('/home/brian/code/dotfiles/.config/omp.toml', 'w'\) as f:
    f.writelines\(lines\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 -c "
with open\('/home/brian/code/dotfiles/.config/omp.toml', 'r'\) as f:
    lines = f.readlines\(\)

for i, line in enumerate\(lines\):
    if 'SSHSession' in line:
        lines[i] = \\"    template = '{{if .SSHSession}} \\ueba9  {{.HostName}} {{end}}'\\n\\"
        print\(f'Fixed: {repr\(lines[i]\)}'\)

with open\('/home/brian/code/dotfiles/.config/omp.toml', 'w'\) as f:
    f.writelines\(lines\)
")
